rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for header row, no amounts. Matches image exactly.

rows.description: 28 Carriage of Stove, Pans, &c as by Bill
rows.notes: Monetary amounts agreed by both extractors. Description synthesized: gemini-flash correctly included '28' prefix, and gpt-5-mini correctly transcribed 'Pans' (gemini-flash had 'Pouns'). Visual confirmation matches this combined description.
rows.english_description: Transport (carriage) of a stove, pans and other kitchen items as billed.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Carriage of a stove, pans and other items as per bill, amounting to £3 19s 2d.

rows.notes: Significant disagreement on monetary amounts. Visual verification shows: Pounds is 2 (faintly visible, gpt-5-mini got this right). Shillings is 2 (both extractors were incorrect, gemini-flash had 2, gpt-5-mini had 3). Pence is 3 (gemini-flash got this right, gpt-5-mini had 0). Description corrected to 'Pavior' (no 'u') and no trailing dot, based on image.
rows.english_description: Payment to Smith the pavior and others for paving work as per bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Smith the pavior and others for paving work, amounting to £2 2s 3d.
